financial_juice_items.headline: Cuba Says Its Military Is Prepared as Trump’s Threats Multiply
financial_juice_items.description: A senior Cuban official said the country is preparing for a possible military assault as President Donald Trump increases economic pressure on the government in Havana and suggests it could be the next US target after Venezuela and Iran.

financial_juice_items.headline: From Iran to Cuba, Trump’s Sanctions Have Hurt People More Than Governments
financial_juice_items.description: The US says “sanctions” are about regime change, but in practice they are economic warfare against entire populations.
